rulings.Case Title: MICHEL RANTISSI VS. FRANK SHATTUCK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Set Aside Default Of Joseph Shammas
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 10, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF MICHEL RANTISSI Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Of Joseph Shammas. DENIED as no default has been entered against defendant Shammas. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHERONN RASHIDA JOHNSON et al VS. WARREN FOSTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt, Fines, Incarceration
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 10, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF CHERONN JOHNSON Notice Of Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt, Fines, Incarceration. DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the motion and supporting papers. Contrary to assertion in the Notice of Order to Show Cause filed on November 13, 2013 no Points and Authorities and Affidavit of Benny Martin is attached to that filing. Notice provides hearing time of 9:00 a.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. RAY K. SHAHANI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 10, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT RAY SHAHANI DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continued to December 31, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOYCE MASON VS. RONSHENG LI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 10, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT HUIBIN ZHU MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Continued to December 17, 2013. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposing no later than December 11, 2013 by 4 p.m. with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Stay of execution remains in effect. Defendant to provide two copies of the order in conformity with this tentative e ruling. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. MARTIN ENG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacate Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 10, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT MARTIN ENG Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacate Default Judgment. Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES F BLANDING VS. LEIANN MARIE PORTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 10, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT LEIANN PORTER MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. GRANTED subject to (1) Defendant presenting a Proof of Service for the Motion and Order shortening time on Plaintiff; (2) Defendant posting $5,550.44 with the Court no later than December 10, 2013 by 4 p.m.; and (3) Defendant filing answer no later than December 10, 2013 by 4 p.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: QI YONG CHEN VS. SEAN JAMES NUNGARY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Deft, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 10, 2013, line 7. PLAINTIFF QI YONG CHEN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant. GRANTED. No opposition filed. Defendant shall personally serve response to written discovery within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $885 to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK VS. RANDALL B. ALLISON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions, To Compel Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 10, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT RANDALL ALLISON, YOLANDA ALLISON Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions, To Compel Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions. Moot. Responses provided. No sanctions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PLACE OF FRANK'S LLC, VS. ASIASF INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPOATION
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 10, 2013, line 9. PLAINTIFF PLACE OF FRANK'S LLC, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENIED. Triable issue of fact re: whether rent is due. = (501/REQ)
